name: Maison Classique
description: A structured tote of exceptional refinement, handcrafted from full-grain leather sourced from Tunisian tanneries. Clean lines and a quiet confidence define this piece — the bag for the woman who needs nothing to prove.

name: Baya Mini
description: Petite but impactful. The Baya Mini is a crossbody companion for evenings out — its compact silhouette conceals a thoughtfully organized interior. Available in signature blush.

name: Sahara Tote
description: Inspired by the vast, unhurried expanses of the Tunisian desert, the Sahara Tote carries everything with effortless grace. Generous proportions, sculptural handles, and hand-stitched detailing throughout.

name: Maison Clutch
description: The evening companion to the Maison collection. A sleek envelope clutch with a hidden magnetic closure and interior card slots. Compact luxury in its purest form.

name: Baya Hobo
description: The relaxed, effortless shape of the Baya Hobo belies its extraordinary construction. Soft supple leather that moulds to your body over time — a bag that becomes more beautiful with use.

name: Sahara Sac
description: A limited-edition bucket bag from the Sahara collection. Hand-burnished leather with a drawstring closure and adjustable strap. Only 50 pieces produced — each numbered.
